```{=html}
<aside class="side-panel identities-sidebar">
<details open>
<summary>Key identities</summary>
<dl>
  <dt>Break-even quote</dt>
  <dd><code>Q* = (1+f)·P·S<sub>0</sub>·(e<sup>μT</sup>−1)/(μT)</code>.
  Equalises <code>E[Π]</code> of fee and back-to-back.</dd>

  <dt>Variance ratio</dt>
  <dd><code>Var[Π<sub>b2b</sub>] / Var[R<sub>fee</sub>] = (P/f)²</code>.
  Algebraic — any MC disagreement is a bug.</dd>

  <dt>Partial (coverage α)</dt>
  <dd>SD and CVaR scale by <code>(1−α)</code>. At <code>α = 1</code>
  the book is deterministic.</dd>

  <dt>Syndication (cession β)</dt>
  <dd>Retained variance collapses as <code>(1−β)²</code> on top of the
  <code>(1−α)²</code> coverage collapse.</dd>

  <dt>Switching (barrier <code>h·S<sub>0</sub></code>)</dt>
  <dd>Flip to fee at <code>τ = inf{t: S<sub>t</sub> ≥ h·S<sub>0</sub>}</code>.
  Truncates the principal tail — no clean closed form for moments.</dd>

  <dt>Merton compensation</dt>
  <dd>Drift absorbs <code>−λ<sub>J</sub>·κ</code> so
  <code>E[S<sub>t</sub>] = S<sub>0</sub>·e<sup>μt</sup></code>.
  Means survive jumps; variances don't.</dd>
</dl>
</details>
</aside>
```
